name: Discord
description: Build bots and integrate with Discord servers. Send messages, manage channels, guilds, members, threads, and reactions through the Discord Bot API.

capabilities.name: messages_create
capabilities.description: Post a message to a guild text or DM channel. Supports text, embeds, components, and file attachments.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve messages from a channel, ordered from newest to oldest.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific message by ID from a channel.

capabilities.name: messages_update
capabilities.description: Edit a previously sent message.

capabilities.name: messages_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a message from a channel.

capabilities.name: messages_bulk_delete
capabilities.description: Delete multiple messages at once (2-100 messages, not older than 14 days).

capabilities.name: messages_crosspost
capabilities.description: Crosspost (publish) a message in an announcement channel to following channels.

capabilities.name: reactions_create
capabilities.description: Add a reaction emoji to a message.

capabilities.name: reactions_delete_own
capabilities.description: Remove your own reaction from a message.

capabilities.name: reactions_list
capabilities.description: Get users who reacted with a specific emoji on a message.

capabilities.name: reactions_delete_all
capabilities.description: Remove all reactions from a message.

capabilities.name: channels_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a channel by its ID.

capabilities.name: channels_update
capabilities.description: Update a channel's settings (name, topic, position, permissions, etc).

capabilities.name: channels_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a channel or close a DM.

capabilities.name: channels_typing
capabilities.description: Send a typing indicator in a channel.

capabilities.name: channels_pins_list
capabilities.description: List all pinned messages in a channel.

capabilities.name: channels_pins_add
capabilities.description: Pin a message in a channel (max 50 pins).

capabilities.name: channels_pins_remove
capabilities.description: Unpin a message from a channel.

capabilities.name: guilds_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a guild (server) by its ID.

capabilities.name: guilds_channels_list
capabilities.description: List all channels in a guild.

capabilities.name: guilds_channels_create
capabilities.description: Create a new channel in a guild.

capabilities.name: guilds_members_list
capabilities.description: List members of a guild with pagination.

capabilities.name: guilds_members_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific guild member.

capabilities.name: guilds_members_search
capabilities.description: Search for guild members by username or nickname.

capabilities.name: guilds_members_modify
capabilities.description: Modify a guild member's attributes (nickname, roles, mute, deaf).

capabilities.name: guilds_members_remove
capabilities.description: Remove (kick) a member from a guild.

capabilities.name: guilds_bans_list
capabilities.description: List all bans in a guild.

capabilities.name: guilds_roles_add
capabilities.description: Add a role to a guild member.

capabilities.name: guilds_roles_remove
capabilities.description: Remove a role from a guild member.

capabilities.name: threads_create_from_message
capabilities.description: Create a thread from an existing message.

capabilities.name: threads_create
capabilities.description: Create a new thread in a channel without a message.

capabilities.name: threads_join
capabilities.description: Join a thread.

capabilities.name: threads_leave
capabilities.description: Leave a thread.

capabilities.name: threads_members_list
capabilities.description: List members of a thread.

capabilities.name: threads_active_list
capabilities.description: List all active threads in a guild.

capabilities.name: users_get_current
capabilities.description: Get the current bot user.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Get a user by their ID.

capabilities.name: users_create_dm
capabilities.description: Create a DM channel with a user.
